name: PHASE 2 Ã¢â‚¬â€œ Cleaner Assignment + Calendar Dispatch

nodes.name: Read Properties
nodes.notes: Tab: CleanersProfile. Columns: property UID, cleaner ID, calendar ID, email, name, contact. Used by Assign Cleaner for lookup.

parameters.jsCode:
// Pass one item so Read Pending Cleaning Jobs runs once (CleanersProfile data is available via $('Read CleanersProfile').all() later).
return [$input.first()];

nodes.name: Single Item for Read Jobs
nodes.notes: Outputs one item so downstream Read Pending Cleaning Jobs runs once. CleanersProfile rows are read once and referenced in Assign Cleaner.

nodes.name: Read Pending Cleaning Jobs
nodes.notes: Same spreadsheet as Phase 1. Sheet: CleaningJobs. Reads all rows; Filter Pending Only filters by status=PENDING and empty cleanerId.

nodes.name: Filter Pending Only
nodes.notes: Ensures we only process PENDING + empty cleanerId. Skips if calendarEventId already set (no duplicate events).

nodes.name: Attach CleanersProfile
nodes.notes: Runs once before loop. Attaches CleanersProfile rows to each item so Assign Cleaner can read them inside the loop.

nodes.name: Split In Batches
nodes.notes: Process one cleaning job at a time to avoid overwrites and allow clear error scope.

nodes.name: Lookup Reservation
nodes.notes: Same spreadsheet as Phase 1. Sheet: Reservations. Enriches with propertyName, address if columns exist.

nodes.name: Ensure One Item (Job or Reservation)
nodes.notes: When Lookup returns no row, pass job only with propertyName/address fallbacks so Assign Cleaner still runs.

nodes.name: Merge Job and Reservation
nodes.notes: One item: cleaning job + reservation fields for propertyName, address, etc.
